---
title: "tbox-finder â€” Phase 2 (Stage-1 training) dev-log"
author: "bioedca"
format:
  typst:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
---

<!-- Rendered with the Typst engine (quarto >=1.9, `format: typst`): the
     laptop/CI toolchain ships no LaTeX, and Typst produces the PDF natively.
     Renders via `conda run -n tbox-finder-viz quarto render analyses/phase2_log.qmd`.
     NOTE (P1 exit-gate lesson): a bare `at`-prefixed token (a length like
     "at-300", a revision like "at-2c2c5c14") is parsed by pandoc as a citation
     key against a doc with no bibliography and kills the render â€” escape or
     rephrase any such token rather than writing it bare. -->

# Phase 2 â€” Stage-1 training

Per-step development log (CLAUDE.md Â§2.4). One stanza is appended after every
step's commit; this file renders to `docs/dev-log/phase2_<YYYY-MM-DD>.pdf` at
the phase-exit gate.

Phase-2 goal (imp.md): train/calibrate the genomic segmenter (production scanner
plus the class-II-CM-naive ablation), run the Â§9.1 hard-negative-mining loop, and
grade **GATE-4** â€” the minimum per-element per-nucleotide F1 over the three core
elements {Stem I, Specifier, Antiterminator}, floor >= 0.80 (ADR-0004 D6). GATE-4
is the project's **first generalization grade**; every Phase-1 number was a
learnability/expressivity smoke on held-out loci and must not be quoted as
generalization (CLAUDE.md Â§10.3).

## Step P2-00 â€” 2026-07-16: source real flanking genomic context for the training corpus

**Inputs.** `data/processed/master_clean_v0.parquet` (23,535 records; `Name` = `accession:start-end`, 11,633 accessions) and the git-LFS `data/processed/splits/split_assignments.parquet` (the identity anchor â€” `ingest.compute_record_hashes(master)` must reproduce its `corpus_record_sha256` set, fail-loud). NCBI `nuccore` via E-utilities.

**Process.** `src/tbox_finder/data/flank_context.py::build_flank_context` (rule `workflow/rules/data.smk::p2_flank_context`) exists because PRD Â§6 pins Stage-1 training positives as offset-augmented placements in a **1024-nt window**, but the corpus stores each locus as `FASTA_sequence` = 104â€“550 nt of dense DNA (median 281) with negligible native flank (median 0 / 50 nt; only 5/23,535 reach 1024 nt) and `data/raw/` is empty. Synthesising the remainder was rejected on the science (a Â§9.1 GC-matched 0th-order splice is a trivially separable boundary cue that would inflate GATE-4 and GATE-1 â€” PRD Â§5). So the flank is **sourced** (PRD Â§10.2). The stored coordinates are **not trusted** (their span agrees with the sequence on only 61.7% of records, 5.9% for `RF00230_master.fa`; all mismatches `span > seqlen` by 1â€“45 nt): a Â±1024-nt region is fetched and the stored sequence is located inside it by **exact string match**, anchored iff it occurs **exactly once** (fail closed â€” 0/>1 hits recorded with a reason). A rate-limited (3 req/s anon; 10 req/s with the run's `NCBI_API_KEY`) resumable concurrent fetch; a permanent HTTP-4xx rejection is a distinct non-retried `unavailable` status.

**Outputs.** `data/interim/flank_context/context_v0.parquet` (DVC; per-record `strand, region_start/stop, locus_offset, locus_length, lead/trail_flank, clipped_start/end, status, pad_nt, context_seq`) + git-tracked `context_v0.provenance.json`; `data/external/ncbi_flank/provenance.json` (Â§10.2 source manifest); measured `reports/p2/flank_context.json` (digest `a25c02dfâ€¦`). Fetch cache (60 MB) gitignored as a resumable intermediate.

**Validation.** anchor rate **0.99987** (23,532 / 23,535 anchored) â€” 2 `multi_hit` (locus repeats within its Â±1024-nt window: `NGLG01000001.1`, `NGLG01000002.1`) + 1 `unavailable` (`CP016400.1`, a suppressed NCBI accession â€” esearch still indexes it but the sequence is withdrawn, so every fetch 400s). Well above the code-frozen `MIN_ANCHOR_RATE` 0.95 and `MAX_FETCH_FAILED_RATE` 0.01 floors (a breach writes nothing and routes to Â§7). 23,253 records are full-1024-window-capable; 841/704 clipped at a contig start/end (PRD Â§6 zero-flank-and-flag). 99 unit tests green; full bare suite 864 passed / 133 skipped, no regression; ruff 0.15.15 + black 25.11.0 + `snakemake --lint` + `-n` clean.

**Decisions.** No ADR â€” implements PRD Â§6 as pinned (no deviation). No env amendment â€” `biopython=1.87` already in `envs/data.yml` (ADR-0002 D8 untriggered). The committed split table is untouched, so the Â§8.2 full-corpus no-leakage test is unaffected. Hardened by a pre-commit adversarial 6-lens review (53 agents; 47 raw â†’ 25 confirmed / 22 refuted): `pad_nt` re-derived from the rows (was the one asserted clause â€” the P1-15/P1-16 lesson again), `validate_report` made total, fetch errors surfaced, retries metered by the limiter, a socket timeout added, the external provenance declared a rule output. **Commit.** authoring `bb03ceb` (branch `p2-00-flank-context`) + this measured-result commit; reconciled to the squash SHA at the P2 exit gate.

## Step P2-01 â€” 2026-07-16: build the Stage-1 window datamodule + curriculum/sampling

**Inputs.** `data/interim/flank_context/context_v0.parquet` (P2-00 â€” `context_seq`, `locus_offset`, `locus_length`, `clipped_start/end`, `status`), `data/processed/labels/labels_v0.parquet` (P0-20 â€” `label_string`, `cognate_aa`), and the git-LFS `data/processed/splits/split_assignments.parquet` (P0-23 â€” `klass`, `resolved_phylum`, `cluster_id`, `nested_train` + the six `FOLD_SCHEME_COLUMNS`). All three key on the same 64-hex corpus record hash; the join was verified exact (23,535 â†” 23,535 â†” 23,535 corpus rows, `record_id == corpus_record_sha256`) and `len(label_string) == locus_length` holds on **100%** of records, so labels are co-extensive with the locus inside `context_seq` as imp.md states.

**Process.** `src/tbox_finder/data/window_dataset.py::Stage1WindowDataset` (no Snakemake rule â€” P2-01 ships a library + a config, not a derived artifact; the rule arrives with the P2-04 entrypoint). A window is placed by its *lead* â€” the count of window positions preceding the locus â€” so offset augmentation is a draw over `lead`, and the locus sits at `[lead, lead+locus_length)`. Labels follow imp.md exactly: the locus contributes `label_string`, **every real-DNA flank position is `background`**, and only zero-flanked positions take `IGNORE_INDEX`. The load-bearing addition is `window_lead_range`, which bounds the honest phase range: a window may step past an end of `context_seq` **only** where P2-00 flagged a real contig boundary (`clipped_start`/`clipped_end`) â€” otherwise the missing sequence is an artefact of our Â±1024-nt fetch, and padding it would fabricate a contig end (PRD Â§5/Â§10.3, the same reasoning that made P2-00 source real flank rather than synthesise it). `Stage1WindowDataset` is torch-free and duck-typed for `DataLoader` (a map-style dataset needs only `__len__`/`__getitem__`), keeping the whole curriculum unit-testable in bare CI; `collate_windows` (lazy torch) batches to tensors. Curriculum = three multiplied inverse-frequency terms (phylum / klass / specifier AA), each `(1/n_stratum)**alpha`, drawn by a seeded torch-free `WeightedIndexSampler`.

**Outputs.** `src/tbox_finder/data/window_dataset.py` (`Stage1WindowDataset` entry; `window_lead_range`/`carve_window`/`tile_windows`; `reverse_complement_ids`; `inverse_frequency_weights`/`curriculum_weights`; `WeightedIndexSampler`; `load_corpus_records`; `windows_digest`; `provenance_rows`; `collate_windows`) Â· `conf/data/stage1.yaml` (Hydra **group option** â€” no package directive, no defaults list; not wired until P2-04) Â· `tests/unit/test_window_dataset.py` (87) Â· `tests/golden/test_window_labels.py` (8) + `tests/fixtures/window_labels/{context_sample.csv (56 real records), expected.sha256 = 38cf7819â€¦}`. No DVC artifact and no new data (a library step).

**Validation.** **PASS.** Golden digest `38cf7819â€¦` reproduced by **two independent paths** (the module carve, and an inline stdlib re-derivation sharing no module code) â€” the `test_archiveii_lofo` precedent; an anti-tautology test confirms a 1-nt label shift moves it. Full-corpus **`TBOX_REQUIRE_NO_LEAKAGE=1` â†’ 25/25 PASS** (CLAUDE.md Â§8.5 mandatory re-run; the committed split table is untouched â€” P2-01 augments in-memory and mints no new record identity, so the partition is unchanged). Suite **1235 passed / 86 skipped** vs a **1144 / 82** baseline re-measured on `main` = **+91 new, zero regression** (the worktree's 5 extra "artifact not materialized" skips were traced to un-copied DVC files, not code, and vanish once materialised). Torch tier: **87/87 with 0 skips** under the pinned torch 2.7.1+cu128 (`tbox-ml-dna`), so the `DataLoader` duck-typing is verified against real torch, not asserted. ruff 0.15.15 + black 25.11.0 + `snakemake --lint`/`-n` clean.

**Decisions.** No ADR â€” implements PRD Â§6/Â§8/Â§11 + ADR-0004 D5/D7 as pinned. **(1) The 3 non-`ok` P2-00 records are dropped, by reason, not native-padded** (imp.md delegated the choice): they are fetch/anchor failures, not real contig ends, so zero-flanking them would assert a boundary that does not exist (Â§10.3) â€” and they are unanchored anyway (`locus_offset == -1`). All 3 are already `nested_train=False`, so the training fold loses nothing; `load_corpus_records` reports `excluded_by_reason = {unanchored:multi_hit: 2, unanchored:unavailable: 1}`. **(2) `no_honest_window` never fires on the training fold** â€” all 8,303 records admit a window (179 eval-mode windows are legitimately zero-flanked at real contig ends). **(3) Sampling alphas are implementer choices** (`WEIGHTS_PINNED=false`; PRD Â§11 pins that the samplers exist, not their strength) and were **chosen on a measured sweep, not assumed** â€” the first draft's Î±=0.5 was **wrong**: the three terms *compound* across correlated axes (Î±=0.5 on 3 axes â‰ˆ Î±=1.5 on the joint stratum), sending **22.8% of the stream to class II and 22.5% of all draws to 10 loci out of 8,303** â€” memorisation of the 22 unique class-II loci, not learning. Î±=0.25 gives 9.0Ã— class-II enrichment (0.27%â†’2.39%), softens Firmicutes 98.5%â†’92.1%, and holds top-10 mass at 1.9%. `test_curriculum_bounds_the_mass_on_any_single_locus` pins the **consequence** (top-10 mass < 5%, max single locus < 1%) rather than the Î±, so any future parameterisation that re-creates the pathology fails CI. This is also why the sampler is not the class-II anti-mimicry mechanism â€” that rests on the class-II-CM-naive checkpoint + the P2-08 construction-powered recovery set (ADR-0005 D9). **(4) Â§9.1 decoys are deliberately NOT mixed in** (disclosed non-delivery, the P1-15 QLoRA precedent): imp.md's `Outputs:` scope P2-01 to the positive-window dataset + the three samplers; the ~10:1 seed ratio and hard-negative mining are P2-07/P2-09, and the P0 `gc_background` pool is a 0th-order composition null with no genomic context, so splicing it into a 1024-nt window is the very cue the honesty rule forbids. **(5) variantâ†’parentâ†’fold is now non-vacuous where it can be** â€” the CI predicate is structurally blind to a runtime augmentation (it reads only rows present in the committed table, all of which are self-parented), so `provenance_rows()` emits one variantâ†’parent row per index and the unit tier runs the same predicate over them, plus a bite-test on a corrupted fold. Augmentation reaches only `nested_train` parents because `load_corpus_records(training_fold_only=True)` never loads a held-out one (PRD Â§11 "constrained to training-fold parents"). **Review.** CodeRabbit CLI r1 was a **real review** (all 7 files in `reviewedFiles`) and returned **7 findings â€” 4 major / 3 minor, all 7 valid and applied**; two were **genuine bugs my own tests missed**, both reproduced before fixing rather than taken on faith. **(a) `Window.lead` was wrong under `rc=True`:** reversing the array moves the locus to `window - lead - locus_length`, but the forward `lead` was reported, so `labels[lead : lead+locus_length]` read the wrong span on *every reverse-strand sample* â€” half the both-strand data would have trained mis-sliced. Measured: reported 137, actual 587. **(b) the more serious one â€” oversampling produced identical copies:** `__getitem__(index)` was a pure function of the index, so under with-replacement sampling the 9x-oversampled class-II records arrived as **9 byte-identical windows** (measured: 8 draws â†’ 1 distinct window), defeating exactly the oversamplingÃ—offset-augmentation pairing PRD Â§11 exists for and driving at the memorisation Î±=0.25 was chosen to avoid. Fixed by making the sampler yield `(index, occurrence)` keys â€” `DataLoader` passes sampler keys through to `dataset[key]` verbatim â€” and folding `occurrence` into the RNG key, so each draw is independently re-phased **and** still exactly reproducible (8 draws â†’ 8 distinct windows, verified through a real `DataLoader` under the pinned torch). The other five: the golden tier claimed to lock the RC transform but only ever carved forward windows (added an RC case with an independently re-derived expectation); `test_sample_csv_is_byte_stable` asserted only `len(digest)==64` â€” a tautology (now pins the real checksum `8663f3b8â€¦`); a `pytest.skip` on a condition that provably could never fire (now an assert); a DataLoader test that could not have caught (b); and a stale `alpha=0.5` docstring. Post-fix: **1241 passed / 87 skipped**, no-leakage **25/25**, torch tier **92/92 with 0 skips**, lint clean.

**Commit.** authoring commit on branch `p2-01-window-datamodule` + a CodeRabbit-r1 fix commit; reconciled to the squash SHA at the P2 exit gate.
